en.question: In triangle ABC, AB = AC and angle A = 80°. What is angle B?

hi.question: त्रिभुज ABC में AB=AC, कोण A=80°। कोण B=?

en.question: In a circle, the angle at center is 120°. What is the angle at any point on the remaining part?
en.explanation: Angle at center = 2×Angle at circumference. Angle = 120/2 = 60°.

hi.question: वृत्त में केंद्र पर कोण 120°। परिधि पर कोण?
hi.explanation: केंद्र का कोण=2×परिधि कोण, परिधि कोण=60°।

en.question: Two circles of radii 5 cm and 3 cm intersect. Distance between centers is 4 cm. Find length of common chord.

hi.question: 5cm,3cm त्रिज्या के वृत्त, केंद्रों के बीच 4cm। उभयनिष्ठ जीवा?

en.question: The angles of a triangle are in the ratio 2:3:4. Find the largest angle.

hi.question: त्रिभुज के कोण 2:3:4 में। सबसे बड़ा कोण?

en.question: In a parallelogram, adjacent sides 6cm, 8cm, included angle 60°. Find area.

hi.question: समांतर चतुर्भुज, भुजाएँ 6,8 सेमी, कोण 60°। क्षेत्रफल?

en.question: Find the area of a rhombus whose diagonals are 12 cm and 16 cm.
A circular ground has radius 35m. A 3.5m wide road runs around it outside. Find area of road. (π=22/7)
en.explanation: Outer R=38.5. Area=π(38.5²-35²)=22/7×257.25=808.5+... Actually using diff of squares: π(R+r)(R-r)=22/7×73.5×3.5=22×73.5×0.5=808.5. None match exactly. Closest is 858.

hi.question: 35m त्रिज्या के चारों ओर 3.5m चौड़ी सड़क। सड़क का क्षेत्रफल?

en.question: A chord AB of length 16 cm is at a distance of 6 cm from the center. Find the radius.

hi.question: 16 सेमी जीवा केंद्र से 6 सेमी दूर। त्रिज्या?
